# Achords

Multi-agent orchestration protocol for software development.

## Documentation

- [For Agents](https://achords.pages.dev/docs/agents/): How agents integrate with achords memory, skills, and conventions.
- [For Humans](https://achords.pages.dev/docs/humans/): Developer setup, installation, and usage guide.
- [Organization Base (obase)](https://github.com/cxto21/achords): CLI to initialize GitHub orgs for multi-agent collaboration.
- [Agent Skills Spec](https://agentskills.io/specification): The specification achords skills follow.
- [Engram](https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/engram): Persistent memory system for agents.
